nsg_api_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from API endpoint source CIDR 10.0.1.0/24 on port 6443 for private admin access.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress for Kubernetes control plane inter-communication on source port 6443

nsg_pods.description: Return pair for broad pod webhook rule: allow TCP ingress from pods to OKE control plane. If broad rule is removed, keep 12250 and 6443 rules.

nsg_pods_12250.description: Allow TCP ingress from pods to kube-apiserver on port 12250

nsg_pods_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from pods on port 6443

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP ingress from OCI services to control plane for responses

nsg_workers_10250.description: Allow TCP ingress to control plane from worker nodes for Kubelet responses on source port 10250

nsg_workers_12250.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from workers on port 12250

nsg_workers_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress to kube-apiserver from workers on port 6443

nsg_api_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from kube-apiserver to API endpoint source CIDR 10.0.1.0/24 on source port 6443 for private admin access responses.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP egress for Kubernetes control plane inter-communication

nsg_pods.description: Broad webhook rule: allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods on any port for API server callbacks. If removed, keep explicit 12250 and 6443 rules.

nsg_pods_12250.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods with source port 12250

nsg_pods_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to pods with source port 6443

nsg_service.description: Allow TCP egress from OKE control plane to OCI services

nsg_workers_10250.description: Allow TCP egress for path discovery to worker nodes

nsg_workers_12250.description: Allow TCP egress from control plane to worker nodes with source port 12250

nsg_workers_6443.description: Allow TCP egress from control plane to worker nodes with source port 6443

nsg_pods_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress from pods to load balancers for responses

nsg_pods_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress from pods to load balancers for responses

nsg_workers_10256.description: Allow TCP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for health check responses on source port 10256

nsg_workers_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for service responses on source ports 30000-32767

nsg_workers_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress from worker nodes to load balancers for service responses on source ports 30000-32767

nsg_pods_tcp.description: Allow TCP egress from load balancers to pods for OCI Native Ingress and Pods as Backends

nsg_pods_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from load balancers to pods for OCI Native Ingress and Pods as Backends

nsg_workers_udp.description: Allow UDP egress from load balancers to worker nodes for NodePort traffic

hub_public_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to pods from Hub public LB subnet 10.0.0.0/24. OKE can create public LBs there; cross-VCN rule uses CIDR instead of NSG.

hub_public_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to pods from Hub public LB subnet 10.0.0.0/24. OKE can create public LBs there; cross-VCN rule uses CIDR instead of NSG.

nsg_cp.description: Broad webhook rule: allow all ingress to pods from Kubernetes control plane. Needed for pod-hosted webhooks on arbitrary target ports.

nsg_cp_6443.description: Allow TCP ingress from control plane to pods on source port 6443

nsg_lb_tcp.description: Allow TCP ingress to pods from load balancers

nsg_lb_udp.description: Allow UDP ingress to pods from load balancers

nsg_workers.description: Allow ALL ingress to pods from workers
